purpose: Fix selected-block Mathpix extraction for non-data-image editable/freeform blocks by rasterizing the selected preview block before backend OCR.
frontendChecks: selected-block Mathpix resolves direct data:image, same-origin/blob image sources, canvas/svg media, then DOM raster fallback
selected-block MinerU uses the same raster fallback
local LaTeX command repair is used as a final fallback for repairable text/math blocks
